title: elaeagnus hortensis var. orientalis
intro: Elaeagnus hortensis var. orientalis, also known as Russian olive or Silverberry, is a shrub-like plant native to Asia and Eastern Europe, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and yellow or orange flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, due to the presence of oleuropein, a polyphenolic compound. The health benefits of Elaeagnus hortensis var. orientalis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be consumed as a supplement to support overall well-being.
